description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated figure in a meditative pose, with hands clasped together at the chest, likely representing a Buddha or similar spiritual icon. The figure is carved from a single piece of stone, with a rounded halo or nimbus behind the head, and detailed drapery folds in the robe. The facial features are serene and calm, with a topknot hairstyle and elongated earlobes. The back of the sculpture is roughly hewn and unadorned, contrasting with the finely detailed front. The stone surface shows natural color variations, with lighter tones on the front and darker, weathered areas on the back. The base is irregular, suggesting it may have been set into the ground or a pedestal.
description: A stone sculpture of a seated meditative figure with a halo, detailed robes, and serene facial features, carved from a single block with a rough back.
description_view_0: The rear side of the sculpture, showing a rough, uncarved stone surface with minimal detail.
description_view_1: An angled top view highlighting the detailed face, clasped hands, and the circular halo behind the head.
description_view_2: A similar angled view from the opposite side, emphasizing the draped robe and meditative posture.
description_view_3: Another rear view, showing the unadorned, weathered stone back and the base of the sculpture.
attribute_subject_matter: seated meditative human figure, likely Buddha
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
